blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 169 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 18°F.
